summary: Exely Real API Integration Testing Complete. All 14 backend tests pass. Frontend Exely page shows active connection with real data from Exely PMSConnect test environment. Connection displays 3 room types and 5 rate plans as expected.

minor.issue: Returns 500 error (not Exely related - separate push notification service)

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: Exely SOAP Security header uses PMSConnect format (Username/Password attributes) - NOT WSSE
VERIFIED: SOAPAction URIs follow WSDL pattern https://www.hopenapi.com/Api/PMSConnect/{Operation}
VERIFIED: Currency is USD for all ARI push operations
VERIFIED: Credentials stored in encrypted vault and NOT exposed in /connection endpoint
VERIFIED: Real Exely test endpoint at https://pmsconnect.test.hopenapi.com/Api/PMSConnect.svc is responding correctly
seed_data_creation: None - using existing Exely connection in MongoDB
context_for_next_testing_agent: Exely real API integration is fully working. Connection established with hotel code 501694 to https://pmsconnect.test.hopenapi.com/Api/PMSConnect.svc. Room discovery returns 3 room types (5001574, 5001575, 5001576) and 5 rate plans (10003182, 10003186, 10003541, 10003869, 10003870). ARI push tests use room code 5001574 and rate plan 10003870. Frontend /exely page shows all data correctly in Turkish UI.

POST /api/channel-manager/exely/connect.notes: Connection already active - returns connection info

POST /api/channel-manager/exely/test.notes: Returns connected=true with room_types and rate_plans

GET /api/channel-manager/exely/rooms/dis.notes: Returns 3 room types (Standart, Deluxe, Suite) and 5 rate plans from real Exely API

POST /api/channel-manager/exely/sync/res.notes: Returns fetched=0, processed=0 (test env has no reservations)

POST /api/channel-manager/exely/ari/push.notes: BookingLimit attribute sent successfully with room 5001574, rate 10003870
Rate push with USD currency successful

GET /api/channel-manager/exely/connectio.notes: Returns connection status WITHOUT exposing credentials

Frontend /exely page.notes: Shows 'Exely Bağlantısı Aktif' with green badge, hotel code 501694

Frontend Rooms tab.notes: Displays all 3 room types and 5 rate plans with correct codes and names

mocked_api_note: NO MOCKED APIs - All tests hit real Exely PMSConnect test endpoint
